# r3id.io

This is the repository for R3ID’s uncompiled Jekyll source code.
R3ID is built using [Jekyll](https://github.com/mojombo/jekyll) and [Doughnut](https://r3id.github.io/doughnut), this repository houses the R3ID specific source code for both.

Despite being open sourced, all R3ID code and content remain copyright of Alan Reid.
